product_depth.justification: All three sections contain accurate, project-specific content derived from the installed domain skills. Criteria keys spot-checked against EA and Ops skill files match exactly. Phase names and owning skills match the existing pipeline diagram. Verification methods are domain-appropriate and distinct per profile.
product_depth.drift_check: Higher because this round adds substantial new authoritative reference content independently verifiable against domain skills. Prior round was surgical fixes to existing content.

functionality.justification: All 16 contract checks pass. 8 pipeline phases covered, 8 dependency entries, 4-step escalation, 5 profiles x 4 keys = 20 criteria keys verified, 5 profiles with distinct verification methods. Zero omissions.

visual_design.justification: Markdown formatting consistent with existing file: level-2/3 headings, pipe-delimited tables, backtick code values. Tables are wide but match the existing file's table style. New sections integrate naturally.

code_quality.justification: Purely additive diff -- 80 lines appended, zero modifications to lines 1-86. Content is concise and non-redundant: references existing pipeline diagram and patterns.md rather than duplicating. 80 lines falls within the 60-80 line contract estimate. No scope creep.

Criteria Key Mapping table covers all 5 profiles with exact keys matching domain skills (EA and Ops spot-checked against source files). Custom profile note included. All contract checks PD-02, FN-04 through FN-09 pass.

internal_consistency.justification: All three new sections follow existing file conventions: level-2 headings, level-3 subsections, backtick code values, pipe-delimited tables. Phase names, skill names, and profile names match existing tables exactly.

intentionality.justification: Every table cell contains project-specific content from domain skills and pipeline structure. Phase 2->4 parallel-eligible reflects Phase Routing table. Escalation references actual harness artifacts. Criteria keys sourced from domain skill heading names. No generic boilerplate.

craft.justification: Heading hierarchy consistent. Tables well-formed with aligned pipes and header separators. Inline code formatting matches existing conventions. 80-line addition proportionate to 86-line existing file.

fitness_for_purpose.justification: Coordinators can follow handoff protocol step-by-step. Evaluators can look up criteria keys directly for NN-evaluation.json construction. Verification method table provides actionable guidance per domain profile.
